title: The Strait of Hormuz: An Ancient Chokepoint in a Modern World

scenes.subtitle_text: The Strait of Hormuz has become a critical chokepoint, driving up petroleum and natural gas prices worldwide, according to the Globe and Mail
scenes.image_search_query: oil tanker passing through narrow strait real life photography

scenes.subtitle_text: This disruption threatens global harvests by cutting off fertilizer supplies and jeopardizes the production of essential medicines and semiconductors
scenes.image_search_query: fertilizer shortage global harvest real life photography

scenes.subtitle_text: Historically, the Strait's economic power has been recognized for millennia, with Marco Polo calling it 'the gem in the ring of the world'
scenes.image_search_query: Marco Polo silk road travel high quality photo

scenes.subtitle_text: The vulnerability to this strategy highlights how deeply rooted our modern technology remains in ancient patterns of resource movement through these sea channels
scenes.image_search_query: ancient trade routes map silk road

scenes.subtitle_text: Throughout history, various empires, from the Sassanids to the Portuguese, have sought to control the Strait to exert economic and political influence
scenes.image_search_query: ancient persian empire sassanid soldiers high quality photo

scenes.subtitle_text: Trump's recent military actions in Iran mirror historical attempts to control the region, but underestimate the Ayatollahs' willingness to weaponize the Strait
scenes.image_search_query: Donald Trump Iran Strait of Hormuz press photo

scenes.subtitle_text: The current crisis exposes a fundamental weakness in the global economy: our dependence on fossil fuels and traditional trade routes
scenes.image_search_query: oil refinery industrial landscape real life photography

scenes.subtitle_text: This revival of ancient economic warfare may finally incentivize a shift toward a more modern, resilient energy economy and diversified trade patterns
scenes.image_search_query: renewable energy wind turbines solar panels real life photography
